alignment_rules: Overview shows up to OVERVIEW_QUEUE_MAX (3) items from queue_1_immediate_next_bundle only.
Full Leverage Queue (4 queues) lives in the Roadmap tab inside the data-testid='roadmap-full-queues' panel.
Roadmap markdown table is appended below the queues so red-team / fix pairing context is in one place.
Roadmap labels (TLS-BND-*, TLS-FX-*, TLS-RT-*, TLS-FIX-*) are text-only. They never become graph nodes (filtered by registryContract.allowed_active_node_ids).

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Overview suppresses the wall; Roadmap tab is the only place to see it
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: Overview Leverage Queue panel shows queue_1_immediate_next_bundle.slice(0,3); Roadmap tab renders the full 4-queue view + markdown table

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: TLS-BND-01 etc. never become graph nodes
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: registryContract.forbidden_unknown_node_examples explicitly lists TLS-BND-01/-02 etc.; validateGraphAgainstContract rejects them; Top 3 cards mark them as text-only

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Roadmap tab still shows pairing status
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: roadmap-tab renders 'Red-team/fix pairing status: paired in sequence (FX → RT → FIX) from roadmap entries' alongside the markdown table
buildLeverageQueueFromRoadmap derives dependency_count from roadmap entries; absent entries default to 0; UI renders 'Depends: 0 artifacts'
